title: BROTHER 734DS Overlocker Machine
subtitle: BROTHER 734DS Overlocker Machine
overview: Take your sewing up a notch with the Brother 734DS Overlocker. It sews, trims and finishes in one go with 3 to 4-thread overlocking, keeping your edges strong and fray-free. The colour-coded guides show you exactly where each thread goes. And the differential feed moves fabric evenly to stop puckering and keep seams looking sharp.  Good to know  - The tension release lever makes threading smoother and prevents snags when adjusting threads - Its free arm design makes it easier to tackle sleeves, cuffs and other tricky bits - You're in control with adjustable stitch length and width - go narrow, wide, short or long - With bright LED lighting, you'll see your fabric clearly, even in the evening

title: SINGER 3321 Sewing Machine
subtitle: SINGER 3321 Sewing Machine
overview: Functional and reliable, the Singer 3321 Sewing Machine is a great choice for anyone looking to explore sewing at home.  Built-in stitch settings  With a clear rotary control dial, the Singer 3321 is easy to start using.   Choose from one of the 3321's 21 different built-in stitches to apply a wide range of finishes to your garments as you experiment with sewing different fabrics and cloths.   The 3321 also features 10 different stretch stitches so you can easily work with materials such as Lycra with confidence and precision.   Get creative   A simple drop-in bobbin system makes set-up and thread changes a quick and pain-free task with snap-on feet helping you quickly swap attachments according to the task at hand. The 3321 includes a general-purpose foot as well as additional feet for sewing four-step buttonholes and attaching buttons.
